agents.hypothesis: AI chip demand is growing faster than global 300mm wafer production, creating upstream supply pressure.
agents.search_prompt: Find recent reports or datasets describing 300mm wafer production capacity, fab utilization, wafer shipment volumes, and wafer supplier backlog or lead times.

agents.hypothesis: Advanced packaging capacity (CoWoS, chiplets, HBM integration) is the real bottleneck in AI chip production.
agents.search_prompt: Search for packaging throughput, CoWoS capacity, packaging backlog, or packaging line expansion announcements related to advanced AI processors.

agents.hypothesis: High bandwidth memory production is a binding constraint for AI accelerator manufacturing.
agents.search_prompt: Search for production volumes, wafer starts, shipment forecasts, and capacity expansion announcements related to HBM memory.

agents.hypothesis: Fab expansion and technological progression are constrained by lithography and fabrication equipment delivery timelines.
agents.search_prompt: Search for backlog sizes, shipment delays, and order growth for semiconductor manufacturing equipment vendors.

agents.hypothesis: Fab growth is constrained by electricity grid limits and water availability rather than chip demand.
agents.search_prompt: Search for reports of semiconductor fab construction delays, energy infrastructure limitations, or water consumption constraints impacting fab operations.

agents.hypothesis: AI datacenter growth is constrained by rack-scale hardware supply rather than GPUs alone.
agents.search_prompt: Search for lead times, supply shortages, or shipment growth related to AI server racks, networking hardware, and cooling systems.

agents.hypothesis: ABF substrates and interposers represent a hidden physical constraint on high-performance chip manufacturing.
agents.search_prompt: Search for ABF substrate capacity, pricing trends, supply shortages, and lead times affecting advanced processors.
